description: User hovers over the first sponsored search result from Unloan.
frame_description: Google search results page for 'home loans comparison' with sponsored results visible.

description: User scrolls down the Google search results page to view more options.
frame_description: The user is scrolling down the page, passing several search results for home loans.

description: User hovers over the Lendi sponsored result title.
interaction_target: Top 20 Home Loan Rates 2026 | Compare Your Best Options Now
frame_description: Cursor pauses over the Lendi search result link.

description: User clicks on the Lendi sponsored search result.
interaction_target: Top 20 Home Loan Rates 2026 | Compare Your Best Options Now
frame_description: The user clicks the link, initiating navigation to the Lendi website.

description: Page navigates from Google search results to the Lendi landing page.
page_title: Compare Top 20 Home Loan Rates In 2026 (January)
frame_description: The screen transitions from Google to the Lendi landing page with 'I WANT TO REFINANCE' and 'I WANT TO BUY A HOME' buttons.

description: User hovers over the 'I WANT TO REFINANCE' button, considering their choice.
page_title: Compare Top 20 Home Loan Rates In 2026 (January)
frame_description: The cursor moves between the two main call-to-action buttons on the Lendi landing page.

description: User clicks the 'I WANT TO REFINANCE' button.
page_title: Compare Top 20 Home Loan Rates In 2026 (January)
frame_description: The button is activated, triggering the start of the refinancing flow.

description: A loading screen appears with the Lendi logo and progress text.
frame_description: Screen shows 'Loading... You're moving along nicely.' with an animated logo.

description: User pauses briefly on the 'What is your current loan balance?' screen before interacting.
frame_description: The first question of the flow is displayed: 'What is your current loan balance?'.

description: User clicks into the loan balance input field to begin typing.
frame_description: The input field is focused, showing a cursor.

description: User types '800,000' into the current loan balance field.
frame_description: The numbers '800,000' are entered into the text box.

description: User clicks the 'NEXT' button to proceed to the next question.
frame_description: The user clicks the green 'NEXT' button.

description: The UI transitions to the next screen asking for interest rate details.
frame_description: The screen updates to 'Please tell us more about your current loan.'.

description: User hovers over the 'I don't know, skip' toggle switch.
frame_description: Cursor lingers over the skip toggle for the interest rate.

description: User clicks the 'I don't know, skip' toggle.
frame_description: The toggle is switched to the 'on' state.

description: The interest rate input field is disabled as a result of the skip toggle.
frame_description: The interest rate input field becomes greyed out.

description: User clicks the 'NEXT' button.
frame_description: The user proceeds to the fixed rate question.

description: User selects the 'No' option for 'Are you currently on a fixed rate?'.
frame_description: The 'No' radio button/card is selected.

description: User clicks the 'NEXT' button.
frame_description: User moves to the lender selection screen.

description: User clicks 'NEXT' without entering a lender, triggering a validation error.
frame_description: The user attempts to skip the lender question.

description: An error message 'Current lender is required' appears below the search box.
frame_description: Red error text appears indicating the field is mandatory.

description: User types 'anz' into the lender search field.
frame_description: The letters 'anz' are typed into the search box.

description: A dropdown menu with lender suggestions appears.
frame_description: A list of banks starting with 'ANZ' appears below the input.

description: User selects 'ANZ Bank' from the suggestion list.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 'ANZ Bank' option in the dropdown.

description: User clicks the 'NEXT' button.
frame_description: User proceeds to the property value question.

description: Loading screen appears briefly between questions.
frame_description: Animated Lendi logo on a white background.

description: User clicks into the property value input field.
frame_description: The input field for 'How much do you think your property is worth?' is focused.

description: User types '1,000,000' into the property value field.
frame_description: The value '1,000,000' is entered.

description: User clicks the 'NEXT' button.
frame_description: User moves to the refinancing goal screen.

description: User selects 'Decrease repayments' as their refinancing goal.
frame_description: The user clicks the first option card.

description: Loading screen appears.
frame_description: Animated Lendi logo.

description: User selects 'I will live there' for property usage.
frame_description: The user clicks the primary usage option.

description: Loading screen appears.
frame_description: Animated Lendi logo.

description: User clicks the 'NO THANKS, NEXT' button on the lender features screen.
page_title: Are any of the following important to you when choosing a lender?
frame_description: The user skips selecting specific lender features.

description: User selects 'Excellent - No issues' for their credit history.
page_title: What do you think your credit history is?
frame_description: The user clicks the top credit rating option.

description: Loading screen appears.
frame_description: Animated Lendi logo.

description: User selects 'Other' for their income source.
page_title: How do you earn your income?
frame_description: The user clicks the third income option.

description: User clicks 'GET MY HOME LOAN MATCHES' without entering a name.
page_title: One last thing, what's your first name?
frame_description: The user attempts to submit the final form step.

description: User navigates back through the entire flow using the browser back button multiple times.
frame_description: The screen rapidly cycles back through all previous question screens in reverse order.

description: User navigates back to the Google search results page.
frame_description: The user is back on the original search results page.

description: User scrolls further down the search results page.
frame_description: Scrolling past previously seen results to find new ones.

description: User clicks on the Mortgage Choice search result.
interaction_target: Compare Home Loans for 2024 (Interest Rates from 5.09%)
frame_description: The user selects a different lender from the search results.

description: Page navigates to the Mortgage Choice website.
frame_description: The Mortgage Choice landing page loads.

description: User hovers over the featured fixed rate interest rate card.
frame_description: Cursor pauses over the large interest rate display.

description: User scrolls down the Mortgage Choice page to see specific loan products.
frame_description: The user scrolls down to the comparison table section.

description: A list of home loan products and their details renders on the page.
frame_description: The comparison table populates with various loan offers.

description: User hovers over the 'Property purpose' filter dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the filter menu at the end of the segment.
